thesis: Mesabi is a pass-through claim on Northshore royalties plus net trust assets and a separate legal option; value is attractive only if recoverable tonnage, operator cadence and contractual pricing support distributions beyond the swing-mine downside.

explanation_contracts.mechanism: Mesabi is a pass-through claim on Northshore royalties plus net trust assets and a separate legal option; value is attractive only if recoverable tonnage, operator cadence and contractual pricing support distributions beyond the swing-mine downside.
explanation_contracts.distinguishing_test: Reconcile operator reserve and production schedule to royalty tiers.
explanation_contracts.counter_explanation: The apparent asset value may be illusory because Cliffs controls a finite swing mine and can minimize third-party pricing evidence and production cadence.
explanation_contracts.valuation_link: Primary method: finite scenario-weighted royalty distribution curve.

open_questions: An independently reproducible reserve, production and royalty-tier depletion schedule is absent.
The arbitration record does not disclose claimed amount, timing, probability or collectibility.
